annotation_target.structure: Ornamented consequent — grace notes, trills on resolution
teaching_goals: ornaments must not rush the resolution
style_tips: main melody note must be heard through the ornament

teaching_notes.note: Grace notes: touch and release — light finger, no pressure.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 13–16 of Nocturne in Eb Major, Op. 9 No. 2 (continuation of mm. 9–12), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 13–16 and describe the ornamentation that appears.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 13–16.

Measures 13–16 bring Chopin's characteristic ornamental turns and trills. The melody resolves to tonic but decorated with grace notes that float above. The ornamentation requires a relaxed wrist. Let me loop mm. 13–16.
Chopin Nocturne mm. 13–16: ornamented consequent, resolves to tonic Eb. Grace notes and trills. Teaching focus: relaxed wrist, ornament timing.

eval_metadata.split_strategy: stratified by (composer, composition_id) with MIDI byte-hash dedup
